name: marveen-marketplace
description: Marveen flotta-channels: third-party channel plugins (Slack, etc.) for ClaudeClaw agents

plugins.name: slack-channel
plugins.description: Two-way Slack channel for Claude Code — chat from Slack DMs and channels via Socket Mode (Szotasz fork with thread-reply auto-deliver)

plugins.name: whatsapp
plugins.description: WhatsApp channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge over the WhatsApp Web protocol (Baileys) with built-in access control and a dedicated-number link flow

plugins.name: teams
plugins.description: Microsoft Teams channel for Claude Code. Azure Bot Service bridge with pairing, allowlist, and policy via /teams:access.
